name: codex-plugin-glab
description: GitLab integration for Codex via glab CLI's built-in MCP server. Provides merge request, issue, and CI/CD pipeline workflows for self-hosted and SaaS GitLab instances.

interface.longDescription: Interact with GitLab merge requests, issues, and CI/CD pipelines through the glab CLI's MCP server. Works with both GitLab SaaS and self-hosted free-tier instances.
defaultPrompt: List my open merge requests on GitLab.
Show failing CI pipelines for this project.
Create a GitLab issue from this bug report.
